rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it addresses the same core mechanism (managed infrastructure for training and serving LLMs) and measures the same dependent variables (training stability, fault tolerance, and efficiency) on the same domain (large-scale GPU clusters for LLMs) as the user's reference paper "MinT".
